name: Chicken Broccoli Pockets
recipeIngredient: 8 cups chopped broccoli, fresh or frozen
recipeInstructions:
1. If the broccoli is fresh, cook it; if frozen, thaw it.
2. Mix all ingredients together.
3. Divide about 4 cups of the mixture into each of 4 freezer bags.
4. Freeze the bags.
5. To serve later, microwave on defrost until done. (My husband enjoys these in his lunch.) The remaining three portions can be cooked another day from frozen.
